title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Calcutta Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Calcutta Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta Capital India:
IIM Calcutta Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta Capital India!
